creator: hsn@netmag.cz
text:
> Did you set any specific option in rc.conf?
more information about my system

sanatana# uname -a
FreeBSD sanatana.dharma 6.1-STABLE FreeBSD 6.1-STABLE #2: Tue Jun 27 10:46:03 CE
ST 2006     root@sanatana.dharma:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/UP  i386
sanatana# cat /etc/rc.conf | grep tomcat
tomcat55_enable=YES
anatana# sha1 /etc/rc.subr
SHA1 (/etc/rc.subr) = 40c3ba964d70f08c18a8f9282a47a0ba663ca60a
sanatana# ll /etc/rc.subr
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  33855 Jun 27 12:14 /etc/rc.subr
$FreeBSD: src/etc/rc.subr,v 1.34.2.13

my packages:
pkg tomcat55 5.5.17 2006-07-03
pkg diablo-jdk15 1.5.0.06.00 2006-04-06 (downloaded binary package)
pkg javavmwrapper 2.3 2006-06-12
